prompt: 把 README.md 的第一行标题从当前内容改成 '# AutoSkill - 技能训练系统'。

assertions.name: file_created
assertions.text: 修改后的 README.md 已创建

assertions.name: rest_preserved
assertions.expected: only the first line should change, everything else intact

assertions.name: not_overengineered
assertions.text: with_skill 版本没有过度设计简单任务
assertions.expected: should recognize this is a simple task and keep the loop minimal

assertions.name: efficient_execution
assertions.expected: should not create unnecessary files or documentation for a one-line change
